pages.title: Two Tiers
pages.text: $(item)Blood-Infused Wooden$() tools are the cheap early set — wood-tier mining level, but with higher enchantability than their vanilla counterparts.$(br2)$(item)Blood-Infused Iron$() tools are the workhorse tier — roughly diamond-equivalent in damage, iron-equivalent in mining level, and they auto-repair from the wearer's $(l:bloodmagic:altar/soul_network)Soul Network$() while in the inventory.

pages.title: Sickle
pages.text: A plant-harvester. Breaking a crop, bush, or flower sweeps a square of matching blocks around it — $(6)3×3$() for wooden, $(6)5×5$() for iron. Use a right-click-drag to sweep a garden in seconds.

pages.title: Bound Sickle
pages.text: The top-tier sickle. Netherite-durable, $(6)7×7$() harvest area, auto-repairing. Crafted by binding a $(item)Blood-Infused Iron Sickle$() via $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/altare)Sanguine Infusion$() with a $(item)Bound Blood Diamond$().

pages.title: Other bound tools
pages.text: $(item)Bound Stick$(), $(item)Bound Igniter$(), and $(item)Bound Shears$() round out the set. Each is a crafting component — together they build the $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/stasis)Stasis tools$().
